message:
fix(freeze): fix intermittent GC crash and cleanup assertion

Two fixes for frozen interpreter stability:

1. Use immediate detachment for local closure captures instead of
   shared var_refs. This fixes intermittent crashes (~40% failure rate)
   when forEach callbacks access local closure variables. The shared
   var_refs mechanism pointed to stack-allocated _locals_jsv arrays
   which could become invalid.

2. Add VAR_REF handling in gc_free_cycles to properly free var_refs
   that end up in GC cycles. This fixes the assertion failure
   "list_empty(&rt->gc_obj_list)" at runtime shutdown.
